issue_title: UPNP Sensors Not Present at all
issue_body:
### The problem

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/67116557/136461189-add2ab1b-3934-487c-ae9b-53f30289ddc9.png)
 Unknown cause as why the sensors are not showing up - just says device - R8000 Gateway

### What is version of Home Assistant Core has the issue?

core-2021.10.0

### What was the last working version of Home Assistant Core?

_No response_

### What type of installation are you running?

Home Assistant OS

### Integration causing the issue

UPNP/IGD

### Link to integration documentation on our website

https://www.home-assistant.io/integrations/upnp/

### Example YAML snippet

_No response_

### Anything in the logs that might be useful for us?

Logger: homeassistant.config_entries
Source: config_entries.py:335 
First occurred: October 6, 2021, 6:51:34 PM (1 occurrences) 
Last logged: October 6, 2021, 6:51:34 PM

Config entry 'R8000 (Gateway)' for upnp integration not ready yet: Server disconnected; Retrying in background_

### Additional information

_No response_
